ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2017-18) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregate_levels" (
  "aggregate_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregate level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the aggregate level (e.g., County, District, School) */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the aggregate level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the county */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the county (e.g., Northern, Southern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the district */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the district belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., unified, high, elementary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., high, middle, elementary) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the school (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charter_schools" (
  "charter_school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charter school status */,
  "charter_school_name" TEXT /* Name of the charter school status (e.g., All, Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charter school status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charter_school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dass" (
  "dass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DASS status */,
  "dass_name" TEXT /* Name of the DASS status (e.g., All, Yes, No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DASS status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting category (e.g., General, Charter, Special Education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reporting category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, school official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the permission applies to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_metrics" (
  "dashboard_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard metric */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard the metric is on */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the metric on the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_metrics_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
